title: Clean up merged post-remediation feature-branch debt
execution_plan_ref: Operations/EXECUTION_PLAN.md § Initiative: M365 Post-Remediation Branch Topology Cleanup

principles: keep the repo auditable and reviewable by removing stale merged feature branches
preserve only long-lived environment branches as the active topology
fail closed if any delete candidate contains unique work
anti_alignment: Does NOT delete development, staging, or main.
Does NOT delete any branch with commits not already reachable from development.

user_stated_requirements: delete the four local codex/* feature branches
delete the six remote stale feature branches
leave only development, staging, and main locally and on origin where applicable
intent_capture.intent_verification: R1 through R6 capture the bounded branch-topology cleanup required to remove merged feature-branch debt safely.

in_scope: create the cleanup package and prompt pair
verify every delete candidate has zero unique commits beyond development
delete the scoped local feature branches
delete the scoped remote feature branches
out_of_scope: any deletion of branches with unique unmerged work

requirements.description: Create the cleanup plan triplet and prompt pair.
Record the keep set and the approved local and remote delete sets.
Prove every delete-candidate branch has zero unique commits beyond development.
Delete the four scoped local feature branches.
Delete the six scoped remote feature branches.
Synchronize governance tracking and leave only the long-lived environment branches active.

summary: R1 complete on 2026-04-08: created the cleanup plan triplet, prompt pair, and tracker activation on development.
R2 complete on 2026-04-08: froze the keep set at development, staging, and main, and the approved local/remote delete sets exactly as governed.
R3 complete on 2026-04-08: proved each delete-candidate branch had zero unique commits beyond development before deletion (38/0, 44/0, 31/0, and 3/0 for the four local codex branches).
R4 complete on 2026-04-08: deleted the scoped local codex feature branches.
R5 complete on 2026-04-08: deleted the scoped remote feature branches.
R6 complete on 2026-04-08: synchronized governance tracking so only development, staging, and main remain.
